prompt: Create a square 3×3 collage of exactly 9 close-up AI-generated female portrait selfies, all with the same highly polished GPT-image aesthetic: youthful East Asian fantasy/cosplay beauty, large glossy eyes, porcelain skin, soft blush, small nose, slightly parted lips, and an uncanny near-identical face structure across all panels. Canvas is a 1:1 square, divided into 9 equal tiles with no gutters or labels. Each tile is a tight head-and-shoulders crop, mostly frontal or slight three-quarter angle, cinematic shallow depth of field, warm sunlight and soft bokeh backgrounds, ultra-detailed skin and hair, realistic yet subtly doll-like. Include exactly 9 distinct variations: 1) black-haired girl with straight bangs, open-mouth smile, warm indoor festival lighting; 2) elegant traditional fantasy girl with dark updo, red floral forehead mark, red dangling earrings, pink makeup; 3) brown-haired girl wearing a red headband, fingers near cheek, backlit outdoors; 4) short dark-haired girl with red headband, soft smile, pale sunlit background; 5) blue-haired anime-cosplay girl with bangs, glittery skin texture, parted lips; 6) purple-haired girl with bangs, star earrings, hand touching cheek, gentle smile; 7) black-haired girl with pink/red headband and star hair accessory, warm cosplay look; 8) dark brown-haired girl with wispy bangs and star earrings, soft neutral expression; 9) brown-haired girl with loose strands and red headband, serious delicate gaze. Emphasize repeated base-model facial similarity, glossy retouched realism, social-media portrait collage composition, high detail, vibrant but natural colors. No text, no watermark, no borders beyond the tile divisions.

promptZh: 创建一个 3×3 的正方形拼贴图，包含 9 张特写 AI 生成的女性自拍人像，所有图像均采用高度精修的 GPT 图像美学：年轻的东亚奇幻/角色扮演美女，大而有神的眼睛，瓷器般的肌肤，淡淡的腮红，小巧的鼻子，微张的嘴唇，且所有画格中的面部结构几乎完全一致。画布为 1:1 正方形，分为 9 个相等的方格，无间隙或标签。每个方格均为紧凑的头部和肩部特写，多为正面或轻微的四分之三侧面，电影级浅景深，温暖的阳光和柔和的背景虚化，超细腻的皮肤和发丝，既真实又带有微妙的玩偶感。包含 9 种不同的变体：1) 黑发齐刘海女孩，张嘴微笑，温暖的室内节日灯光；2) 优雅的传统奇幻风格女孩，深色盘发，额头红色花钿，红色吊坠耳环，粉色妆容；3) 棕发女孩佩戴红色发带，手指靠近脸颊，户外逆光；4) 短黑发女孩佩戴红色发带，柔和微笑，浅色阳光背景；5) 蓝发动漫角色扮演女孩，刘海，闪亮的皮肤质感，微张的嘴唇；6) 紫发刘海女孩，星星耳环，手触脸颊，温柔微笑；7) 黑发女孩佩戴粉/红色发带及星星发饰，温暖的 Cosplay 造型；8) 深棕发女孩，空气刘海，星星耳环，柔和的中性表情；9) 棕发女孩，发丝散落，佩戴红色发带，神情认真而精致。强调重复的基础模型面部相似度、光泽感的精修真实感、社交媒体人像拼贴构图、高细节以及鲜艳而自然的色彩。无文字，无水印，除方格分割线外无边框。
